notes: Illustrative remote-entry permission policy for Research-Code-Agent.
Adapt keys to your installed OpenCode version before using.
Prompt text is not a security boundary; enforce with OpenCode permissions and filesystem access.
allow_principles: read README.md, AGENTS.md, PAPER_CONTEXT.md, logs/, experiments/summaries/
run Research-Code-Agent tools for summaries, comparisons, and notifications
run long experiments only through tools/run_with_feishu_notify.sh
use opencode-pty only for controlled background sessions inside this project
read opencode-pty session output buffers for status and summaries
abort controlled opencode-pty sessions when requested or timed out
deny_or_confirm_principles: read feishu_bridge.env, .env, secrets, tokens, ssh keys, or credentials
delete project files or run rm/chmod against project or credential paths
upload files or data with scp, curl, wget, rsync, or similar network tools
git push or publish repository changes from the remote Feishu entry
run naked long training commands outside tools/run_with_feishu_notify.sh
use opencode-pty to run arbitrary user-provided shell commands
use opencode-pty to inspect non-project directories or sensitive files
